ogTitle: Thorpdale vs Thorpdale South: Climate Safety

heading: Thorpdale vs Thorpdale South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Thorpdale, Victoria and Thorpdale South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Thorpdale South has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Thorpdale (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Thorpdale or Thorpdale South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Thorpdale has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Thorpdale South scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Thorpdale scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Thorpdale South scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Thorpdale or Thorpdale South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Thorpdale South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
